items.title_en: Japan Raises Rates to 31-Year High to Ward Off War Inflation - The New York Times
items.title_zh: 日本将利率提高至 31 年来的最高水平以抵御战争通胀 - 纽约时报中文网
items.desc_en: Japan Raises Rates to 31-Year High to Ward Off War Inflation  The New York TimesJapan raises interest rate to highest since 1995  BBCBank of Japan hikes rates to 1%, highest since 1995, as yen and inf
items.desc_zh: 日本将利率提高至 31 年来的最高水平，以抵御战争通胀 纽约时报日本将利率提高至 1995 年以来的最高水平 BBC 日本央行将利率提高至 1%，为 1995 年以来的最高水平，原因是日元和人民币升值

items.title_en: 'Dancing girl's' bare torso restored in Indian textbook after backlash
items.title_zh: 印度教科书在强烈反对后恢复了“舞女”裸露的躯干
items.desc_en: A picture in a new school textbook had covered up the naked torso of the famous figurine with dark shading.
items.desc_zh: 新教科书中的一张图片用深色阴影遮盖了著名雕像的赤裸躯干。

items.title_en: Bank of Japan hikes rates to 1%, highest since 1995, as yen and inflation worries take hold
items.title_zh: 由于日元和通胀担忧加剧，日本央行将利率上调至 1%，为 1995 年以来最高
items.desc_en: This is the BOJ's first hike since December, when it raised rates to its current level of 0.75%, also its highest level in over 30 years.
items.desc_zh: 这是日本央行自 12 月以来首次加息，当时将利率提高至目前的 0.75%，也是 30 多年来的最高水平。

items.title_en: Japan raises interest rate to highest since 1995
items.title_zh: 日本将利率提高至1995年以来最高水平
items.desc_en: The Bank of Japan has been raising rates from near-zero since 2024.
items.desc_zh: 自 2024 年以来，日本央行一直在接近于零的水平上调利率。

items.title_en: Qualcomm CEO says AI agents will replace apps — as chip giant works on 40 new AI-powered devices
items.title_zh: 高通首席执行官表示人工智能代理将取代应用程序——芯片巨头正在开发 40 款新的人工智能设备
items.desc_en: Qualcomm CEO Cristiano Amon said he is bullish on smart glasses which could eventually become as big as the smartphone.
items.desc_zh: 高通首席执行官克里斯蒂亚诺·阿蒙表示，他看好智能眼镜，它最终可能会变得与智能手机一样大。

items.title_en: Australia central bank warns hikes are not off the table as it keeps rates steady at 4.35%
items.title_zh: 澳大利亚央行警告称，加息并非不可能，利率稳定在4.35%
items.desc_en: In its statement, the RBA said that inflation was "still too high," which warranted to keep the cash rate unchanged
items.desc_zh: 澳洲联储在声明中表示，通胀“仍然过高”，因此有必要维持现金利率不变

items.title_en: Biotech IPO window is opening but big pharma M&A still sets the pace, top bankers tell CNBC
items.title_zh: 顶级银行家告诉 CNBC，生物技术 IPO 窗口即将开启，但大型制药公司并购仍引领步伐
items.desc_en: Biopharma dealmaking is driven by pressure to top up drug pipelines ahead of major patent expirations later this decade.
items.desc_zh: 生物制药交易是受到在本十年晚些时候主要专利到期之前补充药品管道的压力推动的。

items.title_en: Gold sell-off was a 'reset,' says Barclays — and these mining stocks could benefit from a rebound
items.title_zh: 巴克莱表示，黄金抛售是一次“重置”，而这些矿业股可能会从反弹中受益
items.desc_en: Gold's safe haven status was called into question during the war as the specter of higher interest rates weighed on the non-yielding asset.
items.desc_zh: 战争期间，由于利率上升的担忧令这​​种非收益资产承压，黄金的避险地位受到质疑。

items.title_en: China economy weakens further in May as retail sales post first drop in over three years
